item.title: Fun With ceramics !
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/ceramicpapi?igsh=MWQ1ZGUxMzBkMA I love this guy's videos. Reminds me of my younger brother when he did all his art. We would make up stories and voices for them. I wish I had recorded lots of those dumb fun convos. But that's life. Its the memories we have. Edit: so he sells his ceramic but they sell fast. https://disruptedclay.com/?fbclid=PAY2xjawI0NclleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABpki4DyeevxxZs78UjBx3BjJdc2Romm6RlUse1K3ywulQOXGckQSYmUD0jw_aem_uKnzV0nta4Twtd4sqZpzvQ
item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
makes more sense if you've seen house of the dragon
this happened to a high school friend
mini eggs are amazing
not all of us!
kind of hard to pick a favorite tbh
imagine what actual tropical places look like
it's wild out there these days
he's trying his best ok
loved this show
it's that easy?
again?
i'd like to see someone try to wield that
he said male massage was "out"
as is tradition
probably want to do this outside
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Just for safekeeping…
item.dc:creator: tractorist

item.title: Tuesday CHAOTIC Meme Dump (Have fun while the world is crashing) #811
item.description:
1. Something something damn train, CJ
2. Can't stop laughing at these two
4. A winning strategy
7. Giving a tail to a dog that has never had one before :D
8
10. State of the market
13
14.. Open road, nothing to hit. Nothing to hit, right?
15. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Progress
item.description: After almost 10 years together I left my husband almost 3 weeks ago. While starting over will be hard and things will be tight financially it's what's healthiest for me and my daughter. #single_life

item.title: Phone Clearing Dump 5 / ??
item.description:
They haunt me daily.
They look so happy!
Cowabunga, little dude!
My gf says she wants more letters after her name than in it. She's already surpassed her first name and is halfway through her last.
I went to put on a jacket eleven months ago, and my shoulder hasn't been the same since.
item.dc:creator: natangold

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
This foundation was partially demolished to make way for utilities, compromising its structural integrity.
The support columns in this commercial building have sustained damage from forklifts crashing into them.
This damage is not just from one instance. I guess anyone can be forklift certified these days.
A knife shouldn’t be able to easily penetrate wood like this. If it does, it’s a clear indication of rot, decay, or possible termite damage, all of which can lead to major structural problems.
This block retaining wall is leaning because it wasn’t built to properly support the hillside, one issue being that it lacks proper drainage.
The interlocking system used here is common in older construction, but it’s not the most effective method for long-term stability.
Expansive clay soil expands when wet and shrinks as it dries, which can lead to deep cracks and fissures like this one. In this case, a hammer was able to fit into the fissure. That’s why moisture control in the crawlspace is so important to avoid bigger issues down the line.
Leaning Tower of Pisa who? Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural
